items.title: [CISA KEV] Linux Kernel - Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2022-0492
廠商: Linux
產品: Kernel
漏洞名稱: Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
說明: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the cgroups v1 release_agent feature.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-05
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
reference_urls: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=24f6008564183aa120d07c03d9289519c2fe02af ; https://www.kernel.org/ ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-0492

items.title: [CISA KEV] Android Framework - Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2025-48595
廠商: Android
產品: Framework
漏洞名稱: Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability
說明: Android Framework contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows for code execution that could allow for local privilege escalation.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-05
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
